title: CozyStudios Core
description: Core mod for all CozyStudios modpacks.
body:
![Description Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c979f65ace8b50cc2463c3ea7420bbf15758c32e_0.webp)

# 🌿CozyStudios Core ## The foundation of every CozyStudios experience. # 📝About

CozyStudios Core is the heart of our modpacks, providing the essential systems, resources, and quality-of-life features that bring our cozy worlds to life. From custom mobs and shared assets to technical under-the-hood improvements, this mod ensures every CozyStudios pack runs smoothly and feels coherent. 🏡 While CozyStudios Core was originally designed for internal use within our official modpacks, we’re making it available so you can enjoy the same upgraded experience in your own worlds too.
